reviews.review_description: I really like where this is going, and hope there will be a full version soon.

reviews.review_title: Great Demo on Quest for training
reviews.review_description:
This app is awesome for training Demo, It's look like real situation. I 'm  student and we don't have like this app for training with this great simulation in our university or personal education. you have nice graphic too with quest limits that I know.
Of course you have to improve steps for complete this trauma training, 

Also I want to say: I can't wait for more new training scenarios and updates.
I can't even download the game like bruh let me play it.

developer_response.body:
Hi dear, We have many users already downloaded and they can play it.
Please wait to download until the progress bar is complete.

If you have any problems you can get in touch at info@dil-corp.com

reviews.review_description: I really appreciate this educational app and its potential for further development. I look forward to seeing more scenarios and features from the creators in the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you appreciate our app's potential and are excited about the possibilities for its future development. We're constantly working to improve and enhance our app with new scenarios and features, so stay tuned for updates. Thanks for using our app and for your support!

reviews.review_description: I love the look of the app and would love to be able to accomplish more on it, but even with a large room scale I had difficulty reaching some instruments in order to attempt an intubation.

The visual content and details in this educational game are fantastic! The graphics are captivating and the attention to detail is commendable. The visuals not only make the game visually appealing but also effectively convey educational content. Great job by the developers in creating an engaging and informative visual experience for learning!
